zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Hastings於1264年出生在英國諾福爾可阿希爾時，他的父親Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings29歲，母親Joane de Cantilupe23歲。他於1292年11月18日與Isabelle Russell在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1298年登記服兵役。他去世於1314年6月24日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾班諾可本享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲考文垂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Hastings于1264年出生在英国諾福爾可阿希爾时，他的父亲Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings29岁，母亲Joane de Cantilupe23岁。他于1292年11月18日与Isabelle Russell在英国苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1298年登记服兵役。他去世于1314年6月24日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾班諾可本享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 米德藍茲考文垂。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Hastings was born in 1264, in Ashill, Norfolk, England, his father, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, was 29 and his mother, Joane de Cantilupe, was 23. He married Isabelle Russell on 18 November 1292, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1298. He died on 24 June 1314, in Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Coventry, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Hastings est né en 1264, à Ashill, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joane de Cantilupe, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle Russell le 18 novembre 1292, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1298. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1314, à Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Coventry, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Hastings 1264 in Ashill, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings 29 und seine Mutter Joane de Cantilupe 23. Er hat am 18. November 1292 in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Isabelle Russell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1298 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 24. Juni 1314 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Coventry, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Hastings è nato il nel 1264 nel Ashill, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Joane de Cantilupe, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle Russell il 18 novembre 1292, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1298. Morì il 24 giugno 1314, nel Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Coventry, West Midlands, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Hastingsが1264年にイギリスノーフォルクアシュイルで生まれた時，父Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsは29歳，母Joane de Cantilupeは23歳であった。1292年11月18日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでIsabelle Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1298年に兵役登録をした。彼は1314年6月24日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアバノクブルンで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ミドランズコベントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Hastings(이)가 1264년 영국 노르폴크 애시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane de Cantilupe(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1292년 11월 18일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Isabelle Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1298년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1314년 6월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 반옥k번에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 커븐트리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Hastings nasceu em 1264, em Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Cantilupe, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle Russell em 18 de novembro de 1292, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1298. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1314, em Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Coventry, West Midlands, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Hastings родился в 1264 г. в местности ашилл, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Cantilupe, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle Russell 18 ноября 1292 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1298 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 24 июня 1314 г. в местности банноккбурн, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности ковентри, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания.
